title: Steelcake
description: SteelCakeMC is a Modpack centered around the Create Mod and Computercraft.
body:
# SteelcakeMC

SteelCakeMC is a Modpack centered around the Create Mod and Computercraft. You can explore the World, build many Machines or code with computers. Play online on our Server and build a big base, and impress other people with big machines and cool programs!

Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/d3rszVCBWw) for more information about the Server!
